summary: Full happy path — Quintiq ingest creates TPOLs and FC POST succeeds (MTC-001)
label: fc-forecast-post
preconditions: Evolve running and connected to DB. FC API available and accessible. Valid OAuth token obtainable. FC Forecast ID configured in appsettings. et_ItemMaster contains matching product codes.
step_action: Send valid Quintiq purchase plan to POST /v1/PurchasePlan/create with all mandatory fields.
step_data: ProductID: PORK001, UoM: KG, Quantity: 1500, StartDate: 2026-08-01
step_result: HTTP 200 returned to Quintiq caller.

step_action: Query et_POTemporaryLines for TPOL records created by the ingest.
step_data: SELECT * FROM et_POTemporaryLines WHERE DateCreated > GETDATE()-1
step_result: TPOL records exist with correct ProductID, Quantity, DateTimeRequired. LineStatus = 5.

step_action: Observe outbound HTTP POST to Foods Connected and check the request payload.
step_data: POST /api/connected/forecasts/{id}/products — Bearer token and API-Version: 1.1 headers present.
step_result: FC receives POST with correct companyProductCode and requiredVolumes array. overwriteExistingEntries and reOpenForecastConfirmation match config values.

step_action: Check Foods Connected response and application log.
step_result: FC returns 2xx success. Success entry in application log with timestamp and FC response status.

summary: FC POST fails — TPOLs still persisted (MTC-006)
label: fc-forecast-post
preconditions: Evolve running. FC API endpoint configured to return 503 (use mock or WireMock stub).
step_action: Configure mock FC endpoint to return HTTP 503 Service Unavailable.
step_data: WireMock stub: POST /forecasts/{id}/products → 503
step_result: Mock configured and verified to return 503.

step_action: Send valid Quintiq purchase plan to POST /v1/PurchasePlan/create.
step_data: Valid Quintiq payload with all mandatory fields.
step_result: Evolve returns HTTP 200 to Quintiq. FC POST exception is caught — not propagated to caller.

step_action: Query et_POTemporaryLines to verify TPOL records were not rolled back.
step_data: SELECT * FROM et_POTemporaryLines WHERE DateCreated > GETDATE()-1
step_result: TPOL records EXIST. No rollback occurred. LineStatus correct. FC failure did not affect DB state.

step_action: Check application log for FC failure entry.
step_result: Log entry shows FC POST failure with HTTP 503 status. No unhandled exception. No stack trace surfaced to caller.

summary: Quintiq payload with missing mandatory field — rejected before TPOL creation (MTC-009)
label: fc-forecast-post
preconditions: Evolve running with validation active on /v1/PurchasePlan/create.
step_action: POST to /v1/PurchasePlan/create with ProductID field omitted from payload.
step_data: { UoM: 'KG', Quantity: 1500, StartDate: '2026-08-01' } — no ProductID
step_result: Evolve returns HTTP 400 with validation error message identifying missing field.

step_action: Query et_POTemporaryLines to confirm no TPOL was created.
step_data: SELECT * FROM et_POTemporaryLines WHERE DateCreated > GETDATE()-1
step_result: No new TPOL rows. Validation failure prevented any DB write.

step_action: Verify FC POST was not attempted.
step_data: Check application log or mock FC endpoint request log.
step_result: No outbound request to FC. FC POST is only triggered after successful TPOL creation.

summary: Successful poll — new offer IDs retrieved and stored (MTC-001)
label: fc-offer-id-poll
preconditions: Polling job configured in et_JobSchedule. FC API accessible with valid token. et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs empty or clean. LatestPostingDate set to 1 hour ago in et_ExternalSystemPostingType.
step_action: Trigger polling job (manually or wait for schedule). Observe outbound GET to FC.
step_data: GET /trading/purchasing/offers?SiteIds=34490&Statuses=Finalised&SentBetweenFrom=...&SentBetweenTo=...
step_result: GET request sent with correct query parameters, Bearer token, and API-Version: 1.1 header.

step_action: FC returns 3 finalised offer IDs on a single page. Check et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs.
step_data: FC response: { items: [{id:1001,status:'Finalised'},{id:1002,status:'Finalised'},{id:1003,status:'Finalised'}], totalPages:1 }
step_result: 3 rows inserted in et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs with Status=0 (Pending). OfferID values correct. DateRetrieved populated.

step_action: Check et_ExternalSystemPostingType for updated LatestPostingDate.
step_data: SELECT LatestPostingDate FROM et_ExternalSystemPostingType WHERE TypeName='FCOfferPoll'
step_result: LatestPostingDate updated to SentBetweenTo value used in this poll run.

step_action: Verify P18-6142 triggered for each new offer ID.
step_result: P18-6142 GET offer detail handler called 3 times — once per new Pending OfferID.

summary: Duplicate offer ID on second poll — silently skipped (MTC-004)
label: fc-offer-id-poll
preconditions: OfferID 1001 already exists in et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs with Status=0. FC is configured to return OfferID 1001 again in the next poll window.
step_action: Trigger second polling run where FC returns OfferID 1001 again.
step_data: FC response includes OfferID 1001 which already exists in et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs.
step_result: No error thrown. UNIQUE constraint or SP logic silently skips the duplicate insert.

step_action: Query et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs for OfferID 1001.
step_data: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs WHERE OfferID = 1001
step_result: Exactly 1 row — no duplicate. Existing row unchanged (Status, DateRetrieved unmodified).

step_action: Check LatestPostingDate updated and no error in log.
step_result: LatestPostingDate advanced normally. No error log entry for the duplicate — debug/info level at most.

summary: LatestPostingDate null on first run — seed value used (MTC-012)
label: fc-offer-id-poll
preconditions: et_ExternalSystemPostingType has no existing entry for this polling type — simulating first-ever poll run.
step_action: Trigger polling job with no LatestPostingDate set in et_ExternalSystemPostingType.
step_data: DELETE or NULL the LatestPostingDate row before triggering.
step_result: No NullReferenceException. System uses the agreed seed/default value for SentBetweenFrom.

step_action: Inspect outbound GET request SentBetweenFrom parameter.
step_result: SentBetweenFrom = agreed seed date (confirm with Dev). Not null. Not empty. Not a malformed URL.

step_action: Verify poll completes normally and LatestPostingDate is set.
step_result: Poll completes. LatestPostingDate written to et_ExternalSystemPostingType. No runaway historical data flood.

summary: Full happy path — offer details fetched and stored correctly (MTC-001)
label: fc-offer-details
preconditions: P18-6139 has inserted OfferID 1001 with Status=0 (Pending) in et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs. FC returns full valid offer details for ID 1001. Supplier mapping seeded. P18-6336 schema in place.
step_action: Trigger combined P18-6139/P18-6142 poll. Observe GET /trading/purchasing/offers/1001 outbound call.
step_data: GET /api/connected/trading/purchasing/offers/1001 — Bearer token and API-Version: 1.1.
step_result: FC returns HTTP 200 with full offer JSON including id, status, supplier, items[], activities[].

step_action: Query et_PurchaseAgreements for the new row created for OfferID 1001.
step_data: SELECT * FROM et_PurchaseAgreements WHERE OfferID = 1001
step_result: New row exists. OfferID=1001. UnitID resolved to correct Evolve supplier. ItemID resolved. Price, AgreedVol, EffectiveDate correctly mapped from FC response.

step_action: Query et_ObjectPrice for line item data.
step_data: SELECT * FROM et_ObjectPrice WHERE ... (link to PurchaseAgreement row)
step_result: New row(s) exist. EffectiveFrom = FC startDateUtc. EffectiveTo = FC expiresUtc. AgreedVol and price correct.

step_action: Check et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs Status for OfferID 1001.
step_data: SELECT Status, DateProcessed FROM et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs WHERE OfferID = 1001
step_result: Status = 10 (Processed). DateProcessed populated with correct timestamp.

summary: et_PurchaseAgreements and et_ObjectPrice are atomic — both roll back on failure (MTC-011)
label: fc-offer-details
preconditions: DB error simulated specifically on et_ObjectPrice INSERT (e.g., constraint violation). FC GET returns valid offer data.
step_action: Trigger offer detail fetch for a known OfferID. Simulate DB failure on et_ObjectPrice INSERT.
step_data: Introduce a test FK violation or trigger a DB error on the ObjectPrice insert path.
step_result: DB error caught by the handler.

step_action: Query et_PurchaseAgreements for the OfferID.
step_data: SELECT * FROM et_PurchaseAgreements WHERE OfferID = {testID}
step_result: NO row exists — both inserts were in the same transaction and both were rolled back.

step_action: Check et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs Status for the OfferID.
step_data: SELECT Status FROM et_FoodsConnectedOfferIDs WHERE OfferID = {testID}
step_result: Status = 0 (Pending) — not 10. OfferID available for retry on next poll.

step_action: Check application log for error detail.
step_result: Error logged with OfferID and error type. Detail sufficient for triage without live reproduction.

summary: Full happy path — SAP code PUT to FC, response confirms update (MTC-001)
label: fc-supplier-sap-put
preconditions: P18-6549 already run — supplierId and siteId stored in et_UnitMaster. et_UnitMaster.UnitInternalReference = '123456' (SAP vendor code). FC API accessible. Supplier active in FC.
step_action: Trigger PUT supplier SAP code action (onboarding trigger or manual admin action).
step_data: Supplier: Cargill. supplierId from et_UnitMaster. siteId from UnitInternalReference1.
step_result: PUT /api/connected/suppliers/{supplierId} sent with sites[{siteId: {id}, companySupplierRef: '123456'}].

step_action: Check FC response for id field and sites[].companySupplierRef.
step_data: Response: { id: 23456, name: 'Cargill', sites: [{id: 12345, companySupplierRef: '123456', companySiteId: 34490}] }
step_result: Response id = supplierId sent (23456). sites[].companySupplierRef = '123456' — confirms SAP code was applied.

step_action: Check application log for success confirmation.
step_result: Log entry: supplier ID. SAP code sent. Response status 200. Confirmation of match between sent and returned companySupplierRef.

summary: SAP code null — PUT blocked before FC call (MTC-007)
label: fc-supplier-sap-put
preconditions: P18-6549 run — supplierId stored. et_UnitMaster.UnitInternalReference is NULL (finance ticket not yet complete).
step_action: Trigger PUT supplier SAP code action for supplier with NULL UnitInternalReference.
step_data: et_UnitMaster.UnitInternalReference = NULL
step_result: Evolve detects null UnitInternalReference before constructing payload. PUT to FC NOT attempted.

step_action: Verify no outbound HTTP request made to FC.
step_data: Check mock FC endpoint or network log.
step_result: Zero requests received by FC. No null companySupplierRef sent that would clear FC's existing SAP code.

step_action: Check error message returned to caller / logged.
step_result: Clear error: 'SAP vendor code not configured — UnitInternalReference is empty for this supplier.' Actionable message identifying the missing field.

summary: P18-6354 → P18-6342 chain — PO supplier resolution works after SAP code PUT (MTC-021)
label: fc-supplier-sap-put
preconditions: P18-6354 has successfully PUT SAP code '123456' for supplier Cargill to FC. P18-6342 available for PO submission.
step_action: Trigger P18-6342 PO POST for a PO with supplier Cargill using supplierCompanyReference = '123456'.
step_data: POST /orders/templates/{id}/issue/single — companySupplierId: null, supplierCompanyReference: '123456'
step_result: FC receives POST and resolves '123456' to its internal Cargill companySupplierId.

step_action: Check FC response companySupplierId field.
step_data: Response: { companySupplierId: 184372, ... }
step_result: companySupplierId is NOT null and NOT 0. External code resolution succeeded — confirming P18-6354 enabled this.

step_action: Verify the same test with P18-6354 NOT having run — confirm resolution fails.
step_data: Use a different supplier whose SAP code has not been PUT to FC.
step_result: companySupplierId = null in response — confirms P18-6354 is a hard prerequisite for P18-6342.

summary: Full happy path — new products inserted into et_ItemMaster (MTC-001)
label: fc-product-sync
preconditions: FC returns 3 new products not in et_ItemMaster. LastUpdatedDate set to 1 hour ago. FC endpoint confirmed and accessible. Bearer token valid.
step_action: Trigger product polling job. Observe outbound GET to FC products endpoint.
step_data: GET /api/connected/products?companySiteId=34490&LastUpdated={timestamp} — Bearer token, API-Version: 1.1.
step_result: GET request sent with correct parameters and headers.

step_action: FC returns 3 products on single page. Check et_ItemMaster for new rows.
step_data: FC response: { items: [{id:1, code:'PORK001', name:'Pork Primal', active:true}, ...], totalPages:1 }
step_result: 3 new rows in et_ItemMaster. ItemCode, ItemName, active flag correctly mapped. No duplicate rows.

step_action: Check et_ExternalSystemPostingType for updated LastUpdatedDate.
step_result: LastUpdatedDate advanced to current poll timestamp. Separate from P18-6139 LatestPostingDate row.

step_action: Check application log entry for poll run.
step_result: Log: 3 new products inserted, 0 updated, 0 errors. Timestamp, LastUpdated param used, product count all present.

summary: Blank items[].code — fallback strategy executed, no corrupt insert (MTC-008)
label: fc-product-sync
preconditions: FC configured to return a product with items[].code = '' (blank string). Fallback strategy confirmed with Dev (CQ-08).
step_action: Trigger product polling job. FC returns product with blank code field.
step_data: FC response item: { id: 9001, code: '', name: 'Unknown Primal', active: true }
step_result: Handler detects blank code. Does not attempt insert with empty string as ItemCode.

step_action: Verify fallback strategy per agreed spec: either skip or use FC id (9001) as fallback key.
step_result: If skip: no row inserted. Warning logged with FC id and product name. If fallback: row inserted with ItemCode='FC-9001'. Either way: no empty-string ItemCode in et_ItemMaster.

step_action: Trigger second poll with same blank-code product. Check et_ItemMaster for duplicates.
step_result: No duplicate row created. Idempotent — second poll produces same state as first.

label: fc-product-sync
preconditions: FC returns product with 2 supplier splits: Cargill 50%, JBS 50%. FC→Evolve supplier mapping seeded. et_PurchaseAgreements has no existing splits for this product.
step_action: Trigger poll. FC returns product PORK001 with supplierSplits.
step_data: supplierSplits[].percent = 0.5000, percentDisplayValue = 50.0000
step_result: 2 rows inserted in et_PurchaseAgreements for PORK001 — one per supplier.

step_action: Query et_PurchaseAgreements for the product's split rows.
step_data: SELECT UnitID, PercentageSplit FROM et_PurchaseAgreements WHERE ItemCode = 'PORK001' AND OfferID IS NULL
step_result: 2 rows: UnitID=Cargill_Evolve_ID, PercentageSplit=0.5. UnitID=JBS_Evolve_ID, PercentageSplit=0.5. Total = 1.0 / 100%.

step_action: Verify split rows do not interfere with P18-6142 offer rows in et_PurchaseAgreements.
step_data: SELECT * FROM et_PurchaseAgreements WHERE OfferID IS NOT NULL
step_result: P18-6142 offer rows (OfferID populated) unchanged. No PercentageSplit field overwritten on offer rows.

summary: Full happy path — buyer creates PO and FC Order ID stored (MTC-001)
label: fc-purchase-order
preconditions: Primal Splits complete with finalised volumes. TPOLs in et_POTemporaryLines. POHID in et_PurchaseOrderHeader. et_UnitMaster has valid UnitInternalReference (SAP code) and UnitEmailAdd. FC template ID configured. P18-6354 complete.
step_action: Navigate to Primal Splits page in Evolve. Click 'Create PO' button.
step_data: Buyer: HFG Canada. Supplier: Cargill. POHID: PO-2026-001.
step_result: Button enters loading/disabled state. POST /orders/templates/{id}/issue/single sent to FC.

step_action: Verify POST payload fields: title, orderNo, currencyId, purchaseDate, purchaseTime, supplierCompanyReference, companySupplierId=null, orderItems[].productId=0, preConfirmed=false.
step_data: Inspect outbound request body.
step_result: All fields correct. companySupplierId=null triggers FC external code resolution. preConfirmed=false confirmed.

step_action: FC returns HTTP 200. Verify response companySupplierId is NOT null and orderItems[].productId is NOT 0.
step_data: Response: { id: 1090755, companySupplierId: 184372, orderItems: [{productId: 4521, status:'Pending'}] }
step_result: External code resolution succeeded. FC Order ID = 1090755.

step_action: Query et_PurchaseOrderHeader for the PO's OrderReference field.
step_data: SELECT OrderReference FROM et_PurchaseOrderHeader WHERE POHID = 'PO-2026-001'
step_result: OrderReference = 1090755. Not null. Not 0. PO status = 'Sent'. Success feedback shown in UI.

summary: Double-click prevention — only one POST sent to FC (MTC-015)
label: fc-purchase-order
preconditions: FC response deliberately delayed 5 seconds (mock or network throttle). Primal Splits page open with valid PO data.
step_action: Click 'Create PO' button.
step_result: Button immediately disabled or enters loading state after first click.

step_action: Immediately click 'Create PO' button again before FC response returns.
step_result: Second click has no effect — button is disabled. No second POST request sent to FC.

step_action: Wait for first POST to complete. Check FC for order count and et_PurchaseOrderHeader.
step_data: Query FC order list for POHID. Query et_PurchaseOrderHeader for OrderReference.
step_result: Exactly ONE FC order created. Exactly ONE OrderReference stored. No duplicate order in FC.

summary: External code resolution failure — companySupplierId null treated as failure (MTC-010)
label: fc-purchase-order
preconditions: SAP code in UnitInternalReference not recognised by FC. Mock FC configured to return 200 with companySupplierId=null.
step_action: Click 'Create PO' for supplier with unrecognised SAP code. FC returns HTTP 200 with companySupplierId=null.
step_data: Mock response: { id: 1090756, companySupplierId: null, orderItems: [{productId: 0}] }
step_result: Evolve response handler detects null companySupplierId. Does NOT treat this as success.

step_action: Query et_PurchaseOrderHeader for OrderReference.
step_data: SELECT OrderReference FROM et_PurchaseOrderHeader WHERE POHID = '{testPOHID}'
step_result: OrderReference NOT set. Null or unchanged from pre-submission value.

step_action: Check PO status and UI feedback.
step_result: PO status NOT set to 'Sent'. User shown error: 'Supplier code resolution failed in Foods Connected'. 'Create PO' button re-enabled for retry.
